title: localization — settings
description: Workspace-facing preferences. Two groups: workspace-level defaults + per-user preferences.

groups.label: Languages
groups.description: Workspace-wide language preferences + AI translation policy.

sections.label: Defaults
sections.description: Which locale new members see by default + fallback for missing translations.

fields.name: default_locale_code
fields.label: Default locale
fields.helpText: Sets the initial locale for new members. Users can override via their profile.

fields.name: fallback_locale_code
fields.label: Fallback locale
fields.helpText: Used when the active locale lacks a translation.

sections.label: AI translation
sections.description: Machine-translation automation for missing keys. Consumes AI-translation entitlement quota.

fields.name: auto_translate_driver
fields.label: Provider
fields.helpText: Different providers have different strengths. See docs for guidance.

fields.name: min_quality_score
fields.label: Minimum quality score
fields.helpText: Translations below this score fall back to the key literal.

fields.name: auto_translate_ttl_hours
fields.label: Cache TTL (hours)
fields.helpText: How long AI translations persist before revalidation. 720 = 30 days.

fields.name: notify_quota_approaching
fields.label: Notify when 80% of AI quota consumed

fields.name: preferred_locale_code
fields.label: Preferred locale
fields.helpText: Overrides the workspace default for this user.

fields.name: use_native_names_in_picker
fields.label: Show language names in native script
